title: astragalus poterium
intro: Astragalus poterium, also known as Mongolian milkvetch, is a plant species in the pea family that is native to the mountainous regions of China and Mongolia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus poterium include boosting the immune system, reducing inflammation, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus poterium is typically prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
